column1: # Controlled lab dose-response of stress-on-stress (survival-in-air) to single contaminants
# and a binary mixture. First CONTROLLED test of the model's impairment curve + mixture
# aggregation (the field SFG/SoS tests cannot isolate single contaminants or mixtures).
#   (1995). Stress on Stress Response: A Simple Monitoring Tool in the Assessment of a General
#   Stress Syndrome in Mussels. Mar. Environ. Res. 39:245-248.
# (anoxia) assayed -> LT50 (days to 50% mortality; higher = more resilient). MoA axis routing
# (parallels the field harnesses): Cu2+ -> maintenance (metal); DMBA (9
# The mixture rows are Cu2+ + DMBA at matched component doses (the paper's "cumulative effect").
# Control LT50 = 7 d (text). dose in micromol/L (uM). type = control/single/mixture.
